_purpose: Stage 6 Agentic Extraction CloudWatch alarms. 3 alarms covering the divergence-rate, restrained-mode-rate, and tool-loop-cap-hit-rate failure surfaces. Apply per-alarm with: aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm --cli-input-json file://<extract-each-alarm-to-its-own-file>
_review_burden: Phase 8 SC #4 — 3 alarms wired with thresholds matching ROADMAP §SC #4 verbatim: divergence_rate >10%, restrained_mode_rate >5%, tool_loop_cap_hit_rate >0.5%. Per-alarm evaluation_periods=3 + period_seconds=300 means an alarm fires only after 15 contiguous breach minutes (anti-flap; one transient spike does not page the operator).
_threshold_test_evidence: Synthetic-breach harness in src/__tests__/stage6-alarm-thresholds.test.js feeds breach data through stage6-alarm-evaluator.js; harness asserts each alarm WOULD fire if AWS evaluated this data. SC #4's 'alarms actually fire on test data' burden closed in JS without requiring a real AWS env.

alarms.AlarmDescription: Stage 6 shadow-mode divergence rate exceeded 10% — investigate prompt regression or schema drift between legacy and tool-call paths.
alarms._review_burden: ROADMAP §SC #4 line 1: divergence_rate > 10%. Period 5min × 3 evaluations = 15 contiguous breach minutes before fire.

alarms.AlarmDescription: Stage 6 restrained-mode activation rate exceeded 5% of sessions — Sonnet is asking too many questions; review prompt anti-over-ask language and per-key ask budget.
alarms._review_burden: ROADMAP §SC #4 line 2: restrained_mode_rate > 5%. Period 5min × 3 evaluations = 15 contiguous breach minutes before fire.

alarms.AlarmDescription: Stage 6 tool-loop-cap-hit rate exceeded 0.5% — Sonnet is hitting the 8-round loop cap; review for runaway tool dispatch loops or schema invariant violations causing repeated retries.
alarms._review_burden: ROADMAP §SC #4 line 3: tool_loop_cap_hit_rate > 0.5%. Period 5min × 3 evaluations = 15 contiguous breach minutes before fire. Target 0% — any breach is a P1 because it means a session reached LOOP_CAP=8 (stage6-tool-loop.js).
